name: run_tests
description: Run Python/Django, Go, Rust, or TypeScript/JavaScript/Node.js tests with proper environment setup. Supports pytest, Django test runner, Go test runner, Cargo test runner, and vitest/jest/mocha/npm test runner. Auto-detects project type from file extensions or package.json/Cargo.toml. Allows filtering tests by name pattern and setting timeouts.
when_to_use: Use when you need to run tests in any project. Replaces ad-hoc test commands like 'cd /app && npx mocha ...', 'cd /app && npx vitest run ...', 'cd /app && go test ...', 'cd /app && cargo test ...', or 'python -m pytest ...'. Use --ts or --js for TypeScript/JavaScript/Node projects (vitest, jest, mocha, or npm test), --go for Go projects, --rust for Rust/Cargo projects, and --django for Django projects. Use --grep to filter specific test names and --timeout to prevent hanging.

parameters.name: test_target
parameters.description: File path, module path, directory, or test name pattern to run

parameters.name: --rust
parameters.description: Use Cargo test runner for Rust projects

parameters.name: --ts
parameters.description: Use TypeScript/Node test runner (vitest, jest, mocha, or npm test)

parameters.name: --app_dir
parameters.description: Application directory (default: /app/src for Python, /app for Go/Rust/TS)

parameters.name: --grep
parameters.description: Filter tests by name (pytest -k, Go -run, vitest -t, Rust testname filter)

parameters.name: --runner
parameters.description: Explicit test runner command (e.g., 'npx vitest', 'npx mocha', 'npx jest', 'npm test')

parameters.name: --args
parameters.description: Additional arguments passed to the test runner

parameters.name: --js
parameters.description: Use JavaScript/Node test runner (vitest, jest, mocha, or npm test). Alias for --ts.

examples.expected: Runs vitest on the specified test file with verbose output.
Runs vitest on src/schema/ directory, filtering tests matching 'lazy', with 60s timeout.
Runs vitest on window.test.ts with explicit runner command.
Go test with filter and count=1.
Rust cargo test for specific test in a package.
Django test runner with custom settings.
Runs mocha on the specified test file with --grep filtering and 30s timeout.

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces 2-3 separate steps (cd to project directory, run test command with flags, add timeout) with a single script call. The --ts/--js flag eliminates boilerplate for TypeScript/JavaScript/Node projects by auto-detecting vitest, jest, mocha, or npm test. Combined --grep and --verbose flags replace multiple sequential test runs and separate grep/cat inspection of test output. Auto-detection of project type saves an additional step of determining the test runner.
